== Notes for [[Item:Q88575|Q88575]] ==

NOT https://www.geni.com/people/Vashti-Amestris/6000000014885114895

who is not known wiki wife of https://www.geni.com/people/Cyaxares-king-of-Media/6000000000437385329 (-690-584)
possibly of https://www.geni.com/people/Xerxes-I-the-Great-king-of-Persia/6000000006078785713 (-519-465)
/!\ PLZ attention time jump /!\

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
